zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Tyeys於大約1287年出生在英國英格蘭可瓦爾時，她的父親Sir Henry de Tyeys21歲，母親Hawise Montagu18歲。她於1302年與Warin de L'Isle在英國越可爾霍爾德內斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1347年8月2日在英國英格蘭享年61歲，埋葬在英國維爾爾爾頓 福利亞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Tyeys于大约1287年出生在英国英格兰可瓦爾时，她的父亲Sir Henry de Tyeys21岁，母亲Hawise Montagu18岁。她于1302年与Warin de L'Isle在英国越可爾霍爾德內斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1347年8月2日在英国英格兰享年61岁，埋葬在英国維爾爾爾頓 福利亞特。

nameMeanings.name: Tyeys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphonse, Camille, Denys, Emile, Philippe.
Dutch: variant, mostly Americanized (or archaic) and Flemish, of Theijs, from a short form of the personal name Mathijs, Dutch form of Matthew .

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Tyeys was born about 1287, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Henry de Tyeys, was 21 and her mother, Hawise Montagu, was 18. She married Warin de L'Isle in 1302, in Holderness, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 2 August 1347, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 61, and was buried in Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Tyeys est née environ 1287, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Henry de Tyeys, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Hawise Montagu, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Warin de L'Isle en 1302, à Holderness, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 2 août 1347, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Chilton Foliat, Wiltshire, Angleterre.

Sie hat 1302 in Holderness, Yorkshire, England Warin de L'Isle geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 2. ja.lifeSummary: Alice Tyeysが約1287年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Tyeysは21歳，母Hawise Montaguは18歳であった。1302年にイギリスヨークシュアイアホールデルネスでWarin de L'Isleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1347年8月2日にイギリスイギリスで61歳で死去し，イギリスウィルトシュアイアチルトン フォリアトにて埋葬された。

ko.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: 영국 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: Alice Tyeys(이)가 대략 1287년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Henry de Tyeys(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise Montagu(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1302년 영국 요르크실르 홀더네스에서 Warin de L'Isle(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1347년 8월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 윌츠히르 치턴 폴리앳에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com Warin de L'Isle em 1302, em Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. ru.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Tyeys родилась около 1287 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Henry de Tyeys было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise Montagu, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Warin de L'Isle в 1302 г. в местности холдирнесс, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 2 августа 1347 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности чилтон фолят, уилцхир, Англия.

Se casó con Warin de L'Isle en 1302, en Holderness, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas.
